name: Multi-Leg Statistical Arbitrage (Basket / PCA-Based)
description: Decompose a large universe of equities (500-3000 stocks) using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to isolate common risk factors. The residuals from the factor model represent idiosyncratic components. Trade the mean-reversion of these residuals when they diverge significantly.
core_logic: R = F*B + epsilon. When z-score(epsilon_i) > 2, expect reversion. Trade hundreds of positions simultaneously in a market-neutral book. Factor neutralize (beta, sector, size).

risk.main_risk: Crowded unwind events (Quant Quake Aug 2007, Mar 2020)

key_papers: AQR Building Better Equity Market Neutral
signal_buy: PCA residual z-score < -2.0 (undervalued vs factor model)
signal_sell: PCA residual z-score > +2.0 (overvalued vs factor model)
